name: @deepsynaps/deepsweeper
description: DeepSynaps maintainer bot — fork of openclaw/clawsweeper with regulated-component guardrail and audit-log integration

scripts.format: oxfmt --write src package.json tsconfig.json schema config .github/workflows
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check src package.json tsconfig.json schema config .github/workflows
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm test
